channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in All Languages (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in All Languages nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📜 affaan-m/everything-claude-code (46622 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: affaan-m

📝 Repository: affaan-m/everything-claude-code

📄 Descrizione: Complete Claude Code configuration collection - agents, skills, hooks, commands, rules, MCPs. Battle-tested configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner.

⭐ Stelle: 46622

🍴 Forks: 5772

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agents anthropic claude claude-code developer-tools llm mcp productivity

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-18T00:51:51Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-16T04:09:26Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📝 Repository: qwibitai/nanoclaw

item.description:
👤 Owner: HBAI-Ltd

📝 Repository: HBAI-Ltd/Toonflow-app

📄 Descrizione: Toonflow 是一款 AI 短剧漫剧工具，能够利用 AI 技术将小说自动转化为剧本，并结合 AI 生成的图片和视频，实现高效的短剧创作。借助 Toonflow，可以轻松完成从文字到影像的全流程，让短剧制作变得更加智能与便捷。
